nasb.text: Moreover, the thing which the king demands is difficult, and there is no one else who could declare it to the king except gods, whose dwelling place is not with mortal flesh.”

esv.text: The thing that the king asks is difficult, and no one can show it to the king except the gods, whose dwelling is not with flesh.”

cnv.text: 王所問的事很難答，除了那不和世人同住的神明以外，沒有人能在王面前把這事說出來。”

ccb.text: 王问的事太难，除了不在人间居住的神明外，无人能为王解答。”
